Description: Interior partition walls - metal stud framing with gypsum board (utility room perimeter walls)
Notes: Estimated ~16' x 20' room with ~12' clear height below mezzanine; perimeter wall area ~46 m2 (net of door opening). Room dimensions TBD.

Description: Wall finishes - paint/sealer on partition walls (moisture-resistant industrial grade)
Notes: Entire wall area; finish must meet moisture resistance and abrasion criteria per REQ-012-02-003.

Description: Floor finish - sealed/treated concrete floor
Notes: Estimated room footprint ~16' x 20' = 320 sqft = ~30 m2. Floor drain and slope provisions included. Dimensions TBD.

Description: Ceiling treatment - underside of mezzanine deck preparation and finish
Notes: Mezzanine deck forms ceiling; underside treatment/paint. Same footprint as floor. Clear height TBD.

Description: Access door - industrial access door supply and install
Notes: Min 1 door; size/type/fire-rating TBD. Parametric estimate for standard industrial hollow-metal door and frame.

Description: Fire-rated door upgrade allowance (if required by AHJ)
Notes: Allowance for fire-rated door assembly upgrade; applicability TBD per AHJ determination.

Description: Fire-rated wall assembly upgrade allowance (if required by AHJ)
Notes: Allowance for fire-rated gypsum/insulation upgrade to partition walls; applicability TBD per code assessment.

Description: Equipment platforms and mounting infrastructure for PKG-013 mechanical equipment
Notes: Structural steel/concrete platforms for heating unit, air exchanger, makeup air system. Design driven by PKG-013 submittals.

Description: Cistern structural pad/plinth (50000 L water storage cistern base)
Notes: Concrete pad or reinforced base for 50000 L cistern. Scope boundary PROPOSAL: PKG-012 provides pad; PKG-014 installs cistern.

Description: Mezzanine stair landing interface and access provisions
Notes: Stair landing interface within utility room zone; coordination with PKG-011.

Description: Access panels supply and install
Notes: Access panels for MEP service access; quantity estimated at 3 EA (mechanical, plumbing, electrical).

Description: MEP penetration rough openings and blocking (walls and ceiling)
Notes: Rough openings for HVAC ducts, exhaust, makeup air, plumbing, electrical conduit. Estimated 12 penetrations.

Description: Penetration sealing and fire-stopping (post-MEP installation)
Notes: Fire-stopping of all wall/ceiling penetrations after MEP installation. Quantity matches ITEM-012.

Description: Floor drain rough-in coordination and slope work
Notes: Floor slope to drain; coordination with PKG-014 plumbing contractor.

Description: Electrical conduit rough-in and junction boxes (2x 8' LED fixtures + outlets)
Notes: Conduit and junction box rough-in for lighting and 15A/120V outlets; coordination with PKG-015.

Description: Design coordination - equipment footprint and clearance verification
Notes: Pre-construction coordination with PKG-013/014/015; includes clearance verification submittal.

Description: Permits and regulatory approvals (building permit + safety code permits)
Notes: Prorated share of overall project permit effort for utility room scope.

Description: Inspections - rough-in and final (AHJ + County PM)
Notes: Rough-in inspections (framing, plumbing, electrical, mechanical) and final inspection.

Description: Construction cleanup and readiness acceptance
Notes: Final cleanup; Readiness Acceptance Checklist preparation and sign-off with PKG-013/014/015.

Description: As-built survey and documentation
Notes: As-built survey, photographic documentation, warranty documentation.

Notes: Level of effort for PM, CPM, Site Superintendent, Cost Estimator, QA/QC Lead, HSE Manager per Level_of_Effort.csv.
